title: ../V3Inst.cpp:360: Module dearray failed -- unpacked array of interfaces badness

features.name: unpacked array of interfaces as module port
features.description: Code should include a module with an unpacked array of interfaces as a port using modport syntax (interface.modport name[N-1:0])

features.name: interface array instantiation with different parameter values
features.description: Code should include multiple instantiations of the same interface type with different parameter values arranged as unpacked arrays

features.name: passing unpacked interface array through module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a module that receives an unpacked array of interfaces as input port and passes it to another module instance
